Why Joyleaf

New Jersey's Most Guided
Cannabis Experience

Best Dispensary Near Roselle, NJ

If you're searching for a cannabis dispensary near you in Union County or the greater Elizabeth, Linden, or Cranford area, Joyleaf is your destination. Located at 711 E 1st Ave in Roselle, NJ, we are minutes from some of New Jersey's most populated communities.

Our store is designed around one principle: you should be able to see, learn about, and choose the right product before you buy it. Every product is on display. Every Joytender is trained to guide you.

Certified Ganjier On-Site

Our co-founder holds a Certified Ganjier designation, the cannabis equivalent of a sommelier. We take product knowledge seriously because it makes a real difference in your experience.

Whether you're a seasoned consumer or a first-timer figuring out where to start, our team meets you where you are. No judgment. Just guidance.

Recreational Cannabis in Roselle, NJ

Joyleaf was among the first recreational cannabis dispensaries to open in Roselle, NJ. We hold license RE000124 and operate in full compliance with the New Jersey Cannabis Regulatory Commission standards.

We serve customers from across Union, Middlesex, and Essex counties. Our central Roselle location off E 1st Ave is easily accessible from Route 1&9, the Garden State Parkway, and I-78.

Weekly Deals & Events

We run weekly specials across all product categories. Our Sessions of Joy events bring the community together with vendor pop-ups, education, and exclusive deals.

Sign up for the JoyRide Club to get birthday perks, secret menus, early access to new products, and monthly event invitations.
